node_5eb3dad3.title: Complaint Filed for Non-Payment

state.description: Plaintiff has filed a formal complaint in court against debtor for non-payment of the invoice despite reminder.
state.legal_issue: Formal legal action initiated due to debtor's failure to pay after reminder.

legal_references.extract: Debtor is in delay after reminder has been sent.
legal_references.summary: Establishes debtor's default after reminder for payment.

artifacts.content: Formal complaint filed by plaintiff for non-payment of invoice.

references.reference: § 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
references.extract: The defendant must respond to the complaint within a set period.
references.summary: Deadlines for debtor response to complaint.

deadlines.summary: Debtor must file a response to the complaint within two weeks after service.

node_5eb3dad3.summary: Plaintiff has escalated the case by filing a legal complaint due to debtor's failure to pay after reminder.

state.description: Debtor has not paid the invoice after a reminder was sent.
state.legal_issue: Debtor has not paid the invoice after a reminder was sent.

node_a2f6b70a.title: Debtor files a formal response to complaint

state.description: Debtor has filed a formal written response to the complaint, disputing the plaintiff's claims and asserting defenses within the statutory deadline.
state.legal_issue: Debtor's response to complaint has been filed within the statutory deadline; court awaits to schedule a hearing for further proceedings as required by law.

legal_references.reference: �a7 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
legal_references.extract: Defendant must file response to complaint within statutory deadline.
legal_references.summary: Debtor complied by filing the response before the legal deadline.

legal_references.extract: Court schedules hearing date after parties' written submissions.
legal_references.summary: Court is now required to schedule hearing following the completion of written pleadings.

artifacts.content: Formal response filed by debtor disputing the plaintiff's claims and presenting defenses.

references.extract: Court schedules hearing date after parties' written submissions.
references.summary: Deadline for court to schedule hearing once parties have submitted their pleadings.

deadlines.summary: Court to schedule hearing date following receipt of response.

node_a2f6b70a.summary: Debtor responded formally to the complaint disputing claims within the legal deadline, advancing the case to the next procedural phase where the court is expected to schedule the hearing in due time.

node_c95f6f99.title: Plaintiff sends reminder to debtor after no response to complaint

state.description: Plaintiff has sent a formal reminder to debtor for responding to the complaint after the expiry of the statutory deadline without receiving a response.
state.legal_issue: Debtor's failure to respond to complaint within statutory deadline triggers plaintiff's right to send reminder and potentially escalate further.

legal_references.extract: Defendant has a statutory deadline to respond to complaint; failure allows plaintiff to send reminders or take action.
legal_references.summary: Supports plaintiff action after no defendant response.

legal_references.reference: § 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
legal_references.extract: The defendant must respond to the complaint within a set period, which is two weeks from service.
legal_references.summary: Establishes the deadline for response after which plaintiff can act.

artifacts.content: Reminder letter sent by plaintiff to debtor due to no response received to the complaint.

references.reference: § 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
references.extract: The defendant must respond to the complaint within a set period.
references.summary: Deadline for debtor response to complaint.

deadlines.summary: Debtor's deadline to respond to complaint expired; reminder sent to debtor after expiry.

node_c95f6f99.summary: No response was received from debtor to complaint within the statutory deadline; plaintiff has sent a formal reminder letter on the day the deadline expired.

artifacts.content: Formal complaint filed by plaintiff for non-payment of invoice.

conditions: Debtor has not paid invoice after reminder
Plaintiff decides to initiate legal proceedings

legal_references.extract: Schuldner gerät durch Mahnung oder Fristablauf mit der Leistung in Verzug.
legal_references.summary: Defines conditions under which debtor is in default after reminder.

legal_references.extract: Kläger kann eine Klage beim Gericht einreichen, um Ansprüche geltend zu machen.
legal_references.summary: Regulates filing of complaints to initiate legal proceedings.

artifacts.content: Formal response filed by debtor disputing the plaintiff's claims and presenting defenses.

legal_references.reference: �a7 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
legal_references.extract: Defendant must file response to complaint within the statutory deadline to present defenses.
legal_references.summary: Sets deadline and requirement for debtor's response to complaint.

legal_references.extract: Court schedules hearing date after parties' written submissions.
legal_references.summary: Court's responsibility to schedule hearing after pleadings are complete.

conditions: Defendant has not filed a response within the statutory deadline

legal_references.extract: If the defendant fails to respond within the set deadline, plaintiff can send reminders or take further legal steps.
legal_references.summary: Allows plaintiff to act after no response to complaint within deadline.

legal_references.reference: § 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
legal_references.extract: The defendant must respond to the complaint within a set period, which is two weeks from service.
legal_references.summary: Defines the statutory deadline for defendant's response to a complaint.
